result.title: Claude's Source Code Got Leaked Across The Whole Internet
result.description:
🚨 Anthropic’s Claude source code just leaked across the internet, and it's revealing some major secrets about how the AI actually works. 

This is just one of the major discoveries from the leak, but I go over all the biggest takeaways in my latest AI news video up on YouTube (link in bio). 

Are you surprised by this leak? Or was it bound to happen at some point? 👇

#AI #AInews #anthropic #claude

result.title: How AI Gets Data Wrong (and how to fix it)
result.description:
Most people think the biggest factor in AI performance is the model.

But often in enterprise settings, the architecture behind how internal data is connected matters even more.

A new benchmark from CData found a ~25% accuracy gap between different MCP server approaches.

Basically, two AI systems using the same model could return very different answers depending on how they access your data and what approach to MCP they use.

If you’re building AI agents, copilots, or internal tools that connect to CRM or project management systems… this is worth understanding.

You can check out the full benchmark, methodology & results from CData here: https://bit.ly/4s4o9p0

#AI #AItools #AIagents
